name: Northeast Cedar Rapids
headline: Fresh Fried Fish, Chicken & Seafood in Northeast Cedar Rapids
body: Captains Fish and Chicken sits right on the 1st Avenue NE arterial in northeast Cedar Rapids, one of the busiest corridors on this side of town. Everything is made fresh to order — fried fish, chicken, wings, and seafood — for takeout and delivery, plus family fish deals and party pans when you're feeding a crowd. Opened in 2024 by owner Ray Aqel, the shop has quickly become a go-to for folks living and working around the Mound View and Wellington Heights neighborhoods, and it's just minutes from downtown Cedar Rapids and Coe College. Because we're steps off 1st Ave NE with quick access from I-380, picking up a fresh-to-order order on your way home is easy, and DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub bring it straight to your door. Rated 4.4 on Google, Captains keeps it simple: fish, chicken, and seafood done right, kids meals for the little ones, and catering-sized combos for game day or a family dinner. Call (319) 221-1040 to confirm current hours before you head over.
localFacts: Captains Fish and Chicken is located on the 1st Avenue NE arterial in northeast Cedar Rapids, minutes from downtown and Coe College.
The shop is near the Mound View and Wellington Heights neighborhoods, with quick access from I-380.
proximityTrustLines: A short drive from Coe College and downtown Cedar Rapids, right on the 1st Ave NE corridor.
Convenient for the Mound View and Wellington Heights neighborhoods, with easy on and off access from I-380.

townFaqs.answer: Yes. From our 1st Ave NE location in northeast Cedar Rapids, we deliver through DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub, and takeout is always available. Everything is made fresh to order.

name: Marion, IA
headline: Fresh Fish, Chicken & Seafood Delivered to Marion, IA
body: Captains Fish and Chicken is an easy trip from Marion, IA. Marion sits just northeast of Cedar Rapids, and our 1st Ave NE shop is roughly 5 miles away — about a 10-minute drive from 1616 1st Ave NE via 1st Ave NE and Hwy 100 / 7th Avenue. That makes us a quick pickup stop for Marion families craving fresh-to-order fried fish, chicken, wings, and seafood. Prefer to stay home? Captains reaches Marion through DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub, so a fresh-to-order meal can come straight to your door. Opened in 2024 by owner Ray Aqel, we keep the focus on fish, chicken, and seafood made fresh to order — plus kids meals, family fish deals up to 50 pieces, and party pans when you're catering a get-together. Rated 4.4 on Google, Captains is a dependable choice whether it's a Friday fish fry, a game-day wing order, or a weeknight family dinner for the Marion crowd. Call (319) 221-1040 to confirm current hours before you drive over or place your order.
